_doc: Manually-walked trailer prices for entries the static def parser sees as price=0. See AlexOQ/trucker#254. Populate via in-game dealer/configurator walk; merger lives at scripts/merge-manual-prices.ts.

schmitz_scs_single._note: Derived 2026-05-09 from S.CS Universal stock offer (58,785 EUR). Other chassis variants (single_2, single_3sp, single_3_15) and chain bases (double, hct) not yet decomposed.

schmitz.scs.single_3.curtain.notes: Build-up: 16785 chain + 20000 chassis_single_3 + 5000 body_universal (no paint). Dealer stock offer with default paint = 58,785.

schmitz.scs.single_3.curtainp.notes: Stock offer. Build-up: 16785 + 20000 + 5000 + 17000 paint. Universal painted variant.

schmitz.scs.single_3.curtain_ef.notes: Build-up: 16785 + 20000 + 5000 ecofix body (no paint). Ecofix unpainted.

schmitz.scs.single_3.curtain_efp.notes: Stock offer. Build-up: 16785 + 20000 + 5000 ecofix + 17000 paint. Matches universal-paint price (5000 body fee identical for both bodies).

schmitz.scs.double_3_2.curtainp.notes: Stock offer (S.CS Universal Double). Decomposition not walked — chain_double base + chassis_double_3_2 unknown. Override 'curtainp' since stock includes paint.

schmitz.scs.hct_3_2_3.curtainp.notes: Stock offer (S.CS Universal HCT). Decomposition not walked.

schmitz.sbo.single_3.dryvan.notes: Stock offer (S.BO Express). Assumed 3-axle 13.7m default; confirm if stock offer references a different chassis. Conflicts with parser=50000 — parser likely missed accessories.

schmitz.sko.single_3.reefer.notes: Stock offer (S.KO cool). Conflicts with parser=80000. S.KO city variant (137,050) has NO matching parser id — see followup issue.

schmitz.sko.double_3_2.reefer.notes: Stock offer (S.KO cool double). Conflicts with parser=132000.

_pending_chassis_disambiguation._note: Stock offers awaiting chassis-axle clarification before id mapping
_pending_chassis_disambiguation.ski_solid_24_77_2_sr_66725: S.KI solid 24/77.2 sr — need axle/length decode (24=volume m³? 77.2 unclear)
_pending_chassis_disambiguation.ski_light_33_9_6_ak_sliding_cover_78725: S.KI light 33/9.6 ak sliding cover — likely ch_3_33_*.light_sc (alu vs steel legs unclear)

_known_parser_gaps.schmitz_sko_city_vs_cool: Stock offers show distinct prices: city=137050, cool=143685. Parser merges both under single 'reefer' body. Tracked at AlexOQ/trucker#256.
